mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT M.USER_NO AS M_USER_NO, M.USER_ID AS M_USER_ID, M.NAME AS M_NAME, M.STATUS AS M_STATUS, H.MH_ACCESS AS H_MH_ACCESS, H.MINIHOME_NO AS H_MINIHOME_NO, P.PHOTO_NO AS P_PHOTO_NO, P.FOLDER_NO AS P_FOLDER_NO, P.PHOTO_ONAME AS P_PHOTO_ONAME, P.PHOTO_RNAME AS P_PHOTO_RNAME, P.PHOTO_URL AS P_PHOTO_URL, P.PHOTO_TITLE AS P_PHOTO_TITLE, P.PHOTO_COMMENT AS P_PHOTO_COMMENT, P.PHOTO_DATE AS P_PHOTO_DATE, P.PHOTO_M_DATE AS P_PHOTO_M_DATE, P.PHOTO_VIEW AS P_PHOTO_VIEW, P.PHOTO_STATUS AS P_PHOTO_STATUS, P.REPORT_CODE AS P_REPORT_CODE, P.PHOTO_REPORT AS P_PHOTO_REPORT, ROW_NUMBER() over (ORDER BY P.PHOTO_VIEW DESC) AS P_RANK FROM MINIHOME H INNER JOIN MEMBER M ON (M.USER_NO = H.USER_NO) INNER JOIN PHOTO P ON (P.MINIHOME_NO = H.MINIHOME_NO) ) PHOTORANK WHERE PHOTORANK.P_RANK = 1 AND PHOTORANK.M_STATUS = 'Y'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT M.USER_NO AS M_USER_NO, M.USER_ID AS M_USER_ID, M.NAME AS M_NAME, M.STATUS AS M_STATUS, H.MH_ACCESS AS H_MH_ACCESS, H.MINIHOME_NO AS H_MINIHOME_NO, P.PHOTO_NO AS P_PHOTO_NO, P.FOLDER_NO AS P_FOLDER_NO, P.PHOTO_ONAME AS P_PHOTO_ONAME, P.PHOTO_RNAME AS P_PHOTO_RNAME, P.PHOTO_URL AS P_PHOTO_URL, P.PHOTO_TITLE AS P_PHOTO_TITLE, P.PHOTO_COMMENT AS P_PHOTO_COMMENT, P.PHOTO_DATE AS P_PHOTO_DATE, P.PHOTO_M_DATE AS P_PHOTO_M_DATE, P.PHOTO_VIEW AS P_PHOTO_VIEW, P.PHOTO_STATUS AS P_PHOTO_STATUS, P.REPORT_CODE AS P_REPORT_CODE, P.PHOTO_REPORT AS P_PHOTO_REPORT, ROW_NUMBER() over (ORDER BY P.PHOTO_VIEW DESC) AS P_RANK FROM MINIHOME H INNER JOIN MEMBER M ON (M.USER_NO = H.USER_NO) INNER JOIN PHOTO P ON (P.MINIHOME_NO = H.MINIHOME_NO) ) PHOTORANK WHERE PHOTORANK.P_RANK = 2 AND PHOTORANK.M_STATUS = 'Y'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT M.USER_NO AS M_USER_NO, M.USER_ID AS M_USER_ID, M.NAME AS M_NAME, M.STATUS AS M_STATUS, H.MH_ACCESS AS H_MH_ACCESS, H.MINIHOME_NO AS H_MINIHOME_NO, P.PHOTO_NO AS P_PHOTO_NO, P.FOLDER_NO AS P_FOLDER_NO, P.PHOTO_ONAME AS P_PHOTO_ONAME, P.PHOTO_RNAME AS P_PHOTO_RNAME, P.PHOTO_URL AS P_PHOTO_URL, P.PHOTO_TITLE AS P_PHOTO_TITLE, P.PHOTO_COMMENT AS P_PHOTO_COMMENT, P.PHOTO_DATE AS P_PHOTO_DATE, P.PHOTO_M_DATE AS P_PHOTO_M_DATE, P.PHOTO_VIEW AS P_PHOTO_VIEW, P.PHOTO_STATUS AS P_PHOTO_STATUS, P.REPORT_CODE AS P_REPORT_CODE, P.PHOTO_REPORT AS P_PHOTO_REPORT, ROW_NUMBER() over (ORDER BY P.PHOTO_VIEW DESC) AS P_RANK FROM MINIHOME H INNER JOIN MEMBER M ON (M.USER_NO = H.USER_NO) INNER JOIN PHOTO P ON (P.MINIHOME_NO = H.MINIHOME_NO) ) PHOTORANK WHERE PHOTORANK.P_RANK = 3 AND PHOTORANK.M_STATUS = 'Y'
